headline: Comcast to Expand its High-Speed Network to the Quad Cities, Bringing Advanced Technology Solutions to Businesses of All Sizes
summary: DAVENPORT, Iowa, March 12, 2026--Comcast today announced plans to expand its fast and reliable network to the Quad Cities, bringing Comcast Business’s high-speed, symmetrical Internet, cybersecurity, and other advanced technology solutions to the area for the first time. This investment also marks Comcast’s first infrastructure investment in Iowa, making it the 40th state in the company’s national footprint.

headline: Comcast NBCUniversal, Telemundo Station Group Partner With Soccer Forward to Deliver $600,000 in Grants to Nonprofits in FIFA World Cup 2026 (TM) Host Cities
